title: Country Perspectives Spain’s Journey
content: This report in the Unlocking IP-backed Financing Series examines the IP finance landscape in Spain and identifies possible actions for mainstreaming IP assets as collateral in financing transactions.
snippet: This report in the Unlocking IP-backed Financing Series examines the IP finance landscape in Spain and identifies possible actions for mainstreaming IP assets as collateral in financing transactions.
sourceDescription: The WIPO RSS newsfeed provides access to the digital versions of our publications, studies and information products.
